data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. Trump releases close-up photo of the attacker, saying the shooting was unexpected; 2. Forbes: BTC's return to $80,000 is gaining traction; SEC Chairman's remarks at the Bitcoin 2026 conference draw attention; 3. Hong Kong police crack down on cryptocurrency "gold nugget money laundering" fraud case involving approximately HK$7 million; 4. LAB's 24-hour increase exceeds 20%; a suspected team address transferred another 18 million LAB to a Bitget deposit address yesterday; 5. Trump recounts details of the dinner security incident, not believing the shooting is related to the conflict with Iran; 6. The US Department of Justice sentences members involved in a $263 million crypto fraud case to 70 months in prison, involving social engineering fraud and luxury spending money laundering; 7. The Bless project team transfers 100 million BLESS tokens from SOL to the BSC chain and sells them; 8. Trump's attitude towards the US soldier predicting Maduro's arrest appears to have changed, with some allies supporting his pardon; 9. Trump: Being president is a dangerous job, I don't want to live in fear; 10. Analysts say that $80,000 is the first effective resistance level for BTC. If it breaks through $82,000, it may enter a period of increased volatility.

data.title: The suspect in the White House correspondents' dinner shooting admitted that his target was Trump administration officials.
data.description: According to CBS News: The suspect in the White House correspondents' dinner shooting has admitted that his targets were Trump administration officials. (Jinshi)

data.title: Suspect Admits Targeting Trump Administration Officials in Shooting Incident
data.description: A suspect involved in the shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner has confessed to targeting officials from the Trump administration. According to Odaily, the admission was reported by CBS News, highlighting the suspect's intention to focus on members of U.S. President Donald Trump's team.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 78,000 USDT with a 0.79% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 26, 2026, 05:14 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 78,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 78,109.992188 USDT, with a narrowed 0.79% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Analysts say $80,000 is the first effective resistance level for BTC; a break above $82,000 could lead to increased volatility.
data.description: Crypto analyst Murphy, writing on the X platform, stated that considering three sets of data (Options Gamma Exposure, Options Open Interest by Strike Price, and Options ATM Implied Volatility), the impact on BTC from an options perspective is as follows: $80,000 is currently the first effective resistance level above BTC. This level simultaneously possesses the conditions of high Call OI, positive Gamma, and low IV. When the price pushes upwards, market makers' dynamic hedging can easily create selling pressure; and the lower the IV, the higher the marginal sensitivity of market makers' hedging adjustments. Therefore, the thickness of this wall (OI of 7,200 BTC + positive Gamma) makes $80,000 a "tough nut to crack" in May. Once it breaks through and approaches $82,000, due to the larger negative Gamma (OI of 4,644 BTC), the market may quickly switch from being suppressed to a "amplified volatility" mode.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Comments on Presidency's Risks After Shooting Incident
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump remarked on the dangers associated with the presidency following a shooting incident related to the White House Correspondents' Dinner. According to NS3.AI, Trump expressed his determination not to live in fear despite the risks. He humorously noted that if Marco Rubio had cautioned him about the potential for violence earlier, it might have influenced his decision to run for office.

data.title: Trump: Being president is a dangerous job, and I don't want to live in fear.
data.description: Following the shooting at the White House correspondents' dinner, when asked if he was worried about his life, President Trump said, "It's a dangerous job." However, he stated he didn't want to live in fear. He also joked that if his Secretary of State, Rubio, had told him beforehand about the risk of violence, he might not have run for president. (Jin Shi)

data.title: White House Media Gala Disrupted by Gunfire
data.description: The annual White House media gala, attended by U.S. President Donald Trump, was thrown into disarray when gunshots were heard. Bloomberg posted on X that the event, typically a formal gathering, quickly turned chaotic as security personnel responded to the incident. Attendees were instructed to lie on the ground for safety as the situation unfolded. Details about the source of the gunfire and any potential injuries remain unclear at this time. Authorities are investigating the incident to ensure the safety of all participants and to determine the cause of the disruption.

data.title: BlackRock's IBIT Options Open Interest Surpasses Deribit for the First Time, Accelerating Bitcoin's Institutionalization Process
data.description: According to Odaily, the open interest (OI) for options on the Bitcoin spot ETF, IBIT, issued by BlackRock, rose to $27.61 billion on Friday, surpassing the $26.9 billion in the Bitcoin options market on the crypto derivatives platform Deribit for the first time.According to Volmex data, the call options holdings in IBIT are primarily betting that the Bitcoin price will rise to $109,709 in the short term, approximately 41% higher than the current level of around $77,400. Meanwhile, the Deribit market mainly expects Bitcoin to rise to about $106,000. Additionally, the average time to maturity of IBIT options is about two months longer than those on Deribit, indicating that investors in the regulated U.S. market are more inclined towards long-term holdings and stronger bullish sentiment. This further highlights the accelerating trend of institutionalization in the Bitcoin market.

data.title: U.S. Soldier Charged for Profiting from Confidential Information on Polymarket
data.description:
The U.S. Department of Justice has charged Gannon Ken Van Dyke, a member of the U.S. Special Forces, with using confidential intelligence to profit illegally on the prediction market platform Polymarket, earning over $400,000.

According to Odaily, CNN recently revealed that U.S. President Donald Trump has seemingly shifted his stance on the matter. Upon learning that the soldier bet on the fall of Venezuelan leader Maduro, Trump compared the situation to baseball legend Pete Rose betting on his own team to win, downplaying the incident. Trump remarked, "It's like Rose predicting his team would win. If he predicted a loss, that would be bad, but he predicted a win, and I will look into it."

Furthermore, due to Trump's support for Rose, several of his allies have suggested that Trump should pardon the soldier.

data.title: Bless Project Sells 500 Million BLESS Tokens Following Recent Surge
data.description: On April 26, the Bless project transferred 100 million BLESS tokens from the SOL blockchain to the BSC chain for sale. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, following a recent surge in BLESS token value, the project has sold a total of 500 million BLESS tokens. This includes 200 million tokens sold through a centralized exchange (CEX) and 300 million tokens sold on the BSC chain.

data.title: Trump's stance on the U.S. soldier who predicted Maduro's arrest appears to have shifted, with some allies supporting his pardon.
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has indicted U.S. Special Forces soldier Gannon Ken Van Dyke, accusing him of illegally profiting over $400,000 by using classified intelligence to predict a U.S. raid on Venezuela on the prediction market platform Polymarket. According to a recent CNN report, Trump appears to have changed his stance on the matter. After learning that the soldier had bet on Maduro's downfall, he immediately compared the incident to baseball legend Pete Rose predicting his own team would win, responding with a dismissive tone. Trump stated, "It's like Rose predicting his team would win. If he predicted he would lose, that would be bad, but he predicted he would win, and I'll investigate that." Furthermore, given Trump's support for Rose, at least several Trump allies have indicated that Trump should pardon the soldier. (CNN)

data.title: The Bless project team transferred 100 million BLESS tokens from the SOL chain to the BSC chain and then sold them.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the Bless project team transferred 100 million BLESS tokens from SOL to the BSC chain and sold them today. Since the recent surge in BLESS prices, the Bless project team's address has sold a total of 500 million BLESS tokens (US$5.09 million): 200 million were transferred to Bitget for sale, and 300 million were sold on the BSC chain.

data.title: Upcoming Week's Macro Outlook: Central Bank Actions and Gold Market Volatility
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). The upcoming week is set to be significant for global markets, with a focus on central bank activities and potential volatility in the gold market amid ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions.

On Monday at 22:30, the U.S. Dallas Fed Business Activity Index for April will be released. Tuesday will see the release of the ADP employment change data for the week ending April 11 at 20:15, followed by the U.S. Conference Board Consumer Confidence Index and the Richmond Fed Manufacturing Index for April at 22:00.

Wednesday's schedule includes the API crude oil inventory data for the week ending April 24 at 04:30. Later, at 22:30, the EIA will release its crude oil inventory data, including figures for Oklahoma's Cushing and the Strategic Petroleum Reserve.

Thursday is particularly noteworthy as the Federal Reserve's FOMC will announce its interest rate decision at 02:00, followed by a monetary policy press conference by Fed Chair Jerome Powell at 02:30. Additional data releases include initial jobless claims for the week ending April 26, March's PCE Price Index, personal spending rates, the first quarter's Employment Cost Index, real GDP annualized growth rate, real personal consumption expenditures, and the core PCE Price Index annualized rate.

On Friday, the final April S&P Global Manufacturing PMI will be published at 21:45.

Some market analysts speculate that Powell's press conference on Thursday might be his last, potentially marking the end of regular Q&A sessions between the Fed's top officials and the press.

data.title: South Korean Soldiers Sentenced for Operating Illegal Crypto Exchange
data.description:
Two active-duty South Korean soldiers have been sentenced to two years in prison for illegally operating a virtual asset exchange and facilitating drug money laundering during their service. According to Foresight News, the Changwon District Court handed down the sentences on April 26, along with fines totaling 54,690,000 Korean won.

Investigations revealed that the defendants ran the illegal trading platform via Telegram from 2023 to 2024. They assisted buyers in converting approximately 54,690,000 Korean won worth of drug payments into virtual currency, which was then transferred to sellers in 90 separate transactions.

data.title: Trump: Security incident at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner will not prevent me from winning the war against Iran.
data.description: Trump stated that the security incident at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner will not prevent him from winning the war against Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Comments on White House Correspondents' Dinner Security Incident
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the security incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner will not deter him from achieving victory in the Iran war. According to Odaily, Trump emphasized his commitment to winning the conflict despite recent events.

data.title: Trump recounts details of the dinner security incident, stating he does not believe the shooting was related to the conflict with Iran.
data.description: In response to reporters' questions, US President Trump said the incident at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner that day was "completely shocking." He heard a noise but thought it was a tray falling to the ground. "I was looking around," he said, but his wife was quicker to get out of the way and seemed to realize what had happened. Trump said he wanted to continue the dinner and promised to reschedule it as soon as possible. Trump stated that he had not received any briefings about threats before the dinner. Trump also mentioned previous assassination attempts against him and called on the American people to "reconcile their differences." He also noted that people from both parties condemned the incident that evening. Trump also thanked the media, saying they "acted very responsibly in their reporting." When asked if the shooting was related to the conflict with Iran, Trump said: "I don't think so." (Jin Shi)

data.title: LAB's price surged over 20% in the last 24 hours, with a suspected team address transferring another 18 million LAB tokens to a Bitget deposit address yesterday.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, the core-related address for LAB (0x1e8e...E166) transferred tokens to the Bitget deposit address (0x6593...E0bF) again yesterday. Statistics show that this address received a total of 18 million LAB tokens in two transactions on April 25th, with a total value of approximately $15.39 million. Currently, the circulating supply of LAB is 230.4M, and the total amount received by this Bitget deposit address represents approximately 7.81% of its total circulating supply. LAB is currently trading at $0.8560, a 24-hour increase of 18.82%, with a circulating market capitalization of approximately $197 million. The large-scale accumulation of tokens on exchanges during the price surge may indicate subsequent selling for cash or market makers adjusting their positions. Previous reports suggested that an address suspected to be from the LAB team transferred 100 million tokens to two Bitget deposit addresses, representing 43.4% of the total circulating supply.

data.title: Hong Kong Police Uncover Cross-Border Phone Scam Targeting Students
data.description: Hong Kong police have revealed the dismantling of a cross-border phone scam targeting mainland students studying in the UK and Australia. According to ChainCatcher, the criminal group impersonated mainland officials, deceiving victims by claiming their involvement in money laundering and other criminal activities. Victims were instructed to 'cooperate with investigations' by traveling to Hong Kong and purchasing gold nuggets from jewelry stores as 'security deposits.' Each purchase was kept under HKD 120,000 to avoid registration requirements, with the group collecting and transferring the stolen goods. The gold was then melted into bars or exchanged for cash and virtual currency. Authorities have received seven related reports, with total losses amounting to approximately HKD 7 million, and the highest single case loss reaching HKD 1.6 million.
